candidate.objective: An experienced Project Manager and Estimator with a background spanning carpentry, site supervision, and project coordination across mining, civil, and construction environments. Levi has progressed from trade-level roles to senior project management, developing expertise in contract management, multi-site coordination, and stakeholder engagement with Tier 1 resources clients including Rio Tinto, BHP, and Glencore.

duties: Preparing and submitting project estimates and tender documentation for civil and mining construction contracts.
Managing project delivery from inception through to completion, ensuring milestones, budgets, and client expectations are met.
Coordinating subcontractors, suppliers, and site personnel across multiple concurrent projects.
Engaging with Tier 1 clients including Rio Tinto, BHP, and Glencore for scope development and reporting.
Overseeing document control, HSEC compliance, and contract administration.
Supervised trade and civil construction activities on university infrastructure projects.
Managed daily site operations, including safety briefings, subcontractor coordination, and progress reporting.
Delivered projects on schedule and within budget through effective resource planning.
Liaised with design consultants, clients, and regulatory authorities throughout project life cycles.
Progressed from carpenter to Site Manager, taking on full responsibility for day-to-day site operations.
Managed crews of up to 20 personnel across residential and commercial construction projects.
Ensured compliance with WHS legislation and site-specific safety requirements.
Coordinated material procurement, scheduling, and quality inspections.
Supervised construction crews and subcontractors on civil and building projects.
Conducted daily toolbox talks and enforced site safety plans.
Coordinated with project managers to track progress against programme and budget.
Managed material deliveries and maintained site documentation.
Commenced as an apprentice carpenter, progressing to Site Foreman upon trade completion.
Completed Certificate III in Carpentry and applied skills across residential and commercial builds.
Assisted senior site management in scheduling, procurement, and safety compliance.
Developed strong foundations in construction methodology, site coordination, and team leadership.

skills.detail: End-to-end project delivery across civil, mining, and construction sectors. Experienced in programme development, cost control, risk management, and stakeholder reporting.
Quantity take-offs, cost estimation, and tender preparation for civil and mining construction contracts. Familiar with lump sum and schedule-of-rates contract formats.
Completed Contracts Management training through AIM (Australian Institute of Management). Experienced in scope management, variations, and progress claims.
Extensive hands-on experience supervising trades and civil crews in mining and construction environments. Competent in SWMS development, toolbox talks, and incident management.
Site induction approved for Rio Tinto, BHP, and Glencore operations. Experienced in Tier 1 client reporting and relationship management.

certifications.details: Nationally recognised trade qualification in carpentry.
Diploma-level qualification in justice and legal studies.
Currently completing a Diploma of Project Management.
Currently completing a Diploma of Leadership and Management.
Contracts Management short course completed through the Australian Institute of Management.
Queensland statutory certificate for coal mining operations.
Queensland risk management competency for mining environments.
Work Activity Permit System — Permit to Work Issuer certification.
Western Australian statutory mine supervisor certificate under the Mines Safety and Inspection Act.
Certified for work at heights including harness use and anchor point inspection.
Competency in atmospheric gas testing for confined space and hazardous area entry.
Certified for confined space entry procedures.
High Risk Work Licence for elevated work platform operation.

referees: Professional references available upon request. Please contact ACM Resources to facilitate introduction.
